testcase.name: tenantRoleSelectionReturnsPreTokenAndStoresFixedOtp
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-20T13:44:45.973+09:00 INFO 79530 --- [denwa-api] [o-auto-2-exec-9] j.c.itec.denwa.service.auth.AuthService : Store-review account detected, issuing fixed 2FA OTP without email | username=tenant-admin@example.test
